🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Autonomous agentic AI systems driven by Large Language Models (LLMs) introduce a new class of security, privacy, and compliance challenges.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Amazon employees say they’re facing termination for backing data center limits
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Amazon employees are accusing their employer of breaking a city law by retaliating against them for testifying about data centers.

⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: A discussion on the regulation of AI and who decides when it's too dangerous.

🔮 On the Horizon.summary: The startup trains embodied AI and world models using Medal’s dataset of 2 billion videos per year from 10 million monthly active users.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and transparent practices, with companies like OpenAI and Adobe introducing new features and tools to address security, privacy, and compliance challenges.
